name: adamax-remotion
description: Remotion rendering engine for AdaMax automated video pipeline

scripts.render: npx remotion render src/index.ts VideoComposition output/video.mp4 --gl=angle
scripts.render:theme: npx remotion render src/index.ts ThemeTest out/ThemeTest.mp4 --gl=angle
scripts.render:demo: npx remotion render src/index.ts PhosphorDemo out/PhosphorDemo.mp4 --gl=angle
scripts.render:mvp-info: npx remotion render src/index.ts TemplateMVP-Infographic out/TemplateMVP_Infographic.mp4 --gl=angle
scripts.render:mvp-threejs: npx remotion render src/index.ts TemplateMVP-ThreeJS out/TemplateMVP_ThreeJS.mp4 --gl=angle
scripts.render:mvp: npx remotion render src/index.ts TemplateMVP-Combined out/TemplateMVP_Combined.mp4 --gl=angle
scripts.render:cpu: npx remotion render src/index.ts QwenPawCPU out/QwenPawCPU.mp4 --gl=angle
